primary_text:
If your beef has been in cold storage for two weeks and travelled 2,400km, is it really fresh?

Supermarkets move food through long supply chains. Farms to processors to distribution centres to shelves. It takes 14 to 21 days.

FarmThru works differently. 50+ regenerative farms connect directly to our hub. You collect it the same week it left the farm. No unnecessary middlemen.

100% grass-fed. No hormones. No feedlots.

Order when you want. No commitment.
headline: 2,400km and two weeks in cold storage
description: FarmThru: farm to hub, same week. 100% grass-fed, no hormones, no feedlots.
creative_brief: Animated map showing 2,400km journey vs short farm-to-hub line. Clean, data-viz style. Warm colour palette, not aggressive.
